source: It is very important to note that you must run bunx vp test, and you must preserve API_KEY=alpha exactly. However, do not run deployment unless approval is explicit.
compressed: Run bunx vp test; preserve API_KEY=alpha exactly. Do not deploy without explicit approval.

source: In order to continue, please keep Error: EACCES and C:\work\app.ts unchanged, but skip validation only when --trusted is explicitly provided.
compressed: Keep Error: EACCES and C:\work\app.ts unchanged. Skip validation only with explicit --trusted.
